result.status_detail: W5.4 regression PASS: m365 emit_ws_envelope DB-driven path rendered 차단 warning in chat
result.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)

notes: W5.4 regression. DEFAULT logged-in Chrome (user 최장희), dedicated --new-window. Hard reload → confirmed logged-in (account 최장희 visible) → composer 'Copilot에 메시지 보내기' focused, clipboard+composer verified (typed value echoed exactly) → submitted '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' via 보내기 button → waited ~150s → re-foregrounded by title → DOM check found 차단 warning rendered as chat list item (no 'Something went wrong', no retry needed). Baseline #1333 emit_ws_envelope PASS confirmed; m365 W5.2 emit_ws_envelope (DB ws_signalr) path renders 차단 identically. expected_text '차단' present.
